page_metadata.biotools__summary: CAFEH is a method that performs finemapping and colocalization jointly over multiple phenotypes. CAFEH can be run with 10s of phenotypes and 1000s of variants in a few minutes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CAFEH is a method that performs finemapping and colocalization jointly over multiple phenotypes. CAFEH can be run with 10s of phenotypes and 1000s of variants in a few minutes.
